reviews.comment:
Buen lugar para realizar un descanzo, con todos los servicios. Tiene un parque de juegos increíble para tomarse un descanso con los niños.

(Translated by Google)
A great place to take a break, with all the amenities. It has an incredible playground for taking a break with the kids.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURndTVIdEJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente! Tanto la atención del personal como la limpieza de los baños y muy linda zona de "acampe" para parar un rato en la ruta

(Translated by Google)
Excellent! Both the staff's attention and the cleanliness of the bathrooms were great, and the "camping" area was very nice for stopping for a while on the road.

reviews.comment:
Reúne todas  las necesidades de cualquier estación ACA del país!! Negocio Full con variedad de alimentos y cafetería!! Amplio parque que permite disfrutar los espacios!! Personal siempre bien predispuesto aún en momentos de congestión por aquellos que transitan la ruta 2!! Muy buena opción!!!

(Translated by Google)
It has everything you need from any ACA station in the country! A full-service business with a variety of food and a cafeteria! A spacious park where you can enjoy the surroundings! The staff is always helpful, even during peak times due to traffic on Route 2! A great option!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBNGRtRENBEAE
